keys.restored: Ugcino olufihliweyo lubuyiselwe ✓ Izitshixo zifakwe kweli qhinga
keys.noBackup: Akukho gcino olufihliweyo likhoyo kule akhawunti

keySetup.title: Misela izitshixo zesixhobo sakho
keySetup.description: Esi sixhobo asikabi nayo isitshixo sakho esiyimfihlo. Ngenisa ugcino olukhuselwe ngephasiwedi, okanye yenza isibini esitsha sezitshixo (uya kuba nakho ukufunda imiyalezo emitsha ukusuka ngoku).
keySetup.imported: Isitshixo esiyimfihlo singeniswe kwesi sixhobo. Ungafunda imiyalezo emidala ngoku.
keySetup.enterPassword: Faka iphasiwedi yeakhawunti yakho ukuze sikwazi ukugcina izitshixo zakho ngokukhuselekileyo.

auth.headline: Umyalezo okhuselekileyo wabani naphi na
auth.description: Ukufihla ukuphela ukuphela, ukuguqulela kwiilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100, imiyalezo enyamalalayo, nokufowuna nge-video.

feature.privacy: Yabucala kuqala. Idatha yakho, ulawulo lwakho.

hero.line1: Umyalezo okhuselekileyo wabani naphi na — nge
hero.sub: Fumana inombolo yefowuni ekhuselekileyo yasimahla ukuze ufowune kwaye uthumele imiyalezo kwihlabathi liphela nge-Wi-Fi okanye idatha. Yenza ukufihla ukuphela ukuphela, imiyalezo enyamalalayo, kunye nokufowuna nge-HD nge-video — ngezixhobo ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ezikunceda uhlale uqhagamshelene kwimida.
hero.freeNote: Ukufowuna nokuthumela imiyalezo kumasiseko simahla. I-AI ephucukileyo kunye neempawu ze-premium zifuna ukuphuculwa.

feat.privacy: Yabucala kuqala. Idatha yakho, ulawulo lwakho.

auth.desktopTip: Kwi-desktop? Skena ngefowuni yakho ukuze ufumane i-app.
auth.scanHelper: Kwi-desktop? Skena ngefowuni yakho ukuze ufumane i-app.
auth.subhead: Umyalezo wabucala, ofihliweyo, kunye nokuguqulelwa — ngokukhawuleza.
auth.tip: Icebiso: Sebenzisa iakhawunti enye kwiwebhu nakwiselfowuni. Imiyalezo yakho ihlala ihambelana.
auth.scanHint: Skena ukuze ukhuphele i-app okanye uvule kwisikhangeli sakho.

registration.passwordDescription: Ubuncinane iimpawu ezi-6. Sebenzisa iphasiwedi eyomeleleyo neyahlukileyo.
registration.smsConsent: Ngokwenza iakhawunti, uyavuma ukufumana izaziso ze-SMS ezinxulumene nomsebenzi wakho weChatforia (njengemiyalezo evela kwabanye abasebenzisi). Imiyalezo kunye neentlawulo zedatha zinokusebenza. Ungarhoxa nanini na ku-Settings.

auth.enterValidRecipient: Faka igama lomnxibelelanisi ogciniweyo okanye inombolo yefowuni.
auth.sendFailed: Ukuthumela akuphumelelanga. Jonga ikhonsoli ukuze ufumane iinkcukacha.

refund.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo wokuBuyiselwa kweMali
refund.intro: KwaChatforia, sizama ukubonelela ngenkonzo ekumgangatho ophezulu kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Lo mgaqo-nkqubo uchaza ukuba nini na imali inokubuyiselwa.

subscriptions.title: Iintlawulo eziqhubekayo (Subscriptions)
subscriptions.body: Iintlawulo zentlawulo zibhatalwa kwangaphambili kwaye ziphindaphindeka. Ungayirhoxisa nangaliphi na ixesha usebenzisa iisetingi zeakhawunti yakho okanye iqonga othenge kulo.

eligibility.title: Ukufaneleka kokuBuyiselwa kweMali
eligibility.body: Imbuyekezo inganikezelwa xa kukho iintlawulo eziphindwe kabini, iimpazamo zokubhatalwa, okanye iingxaki zobugcisa ezikuthintelayo ukufikelela kwiimpawu ezihlawulelwayo. Zonke izicelo zijongwa ngokwazo.

nonRefundable.title: Okungabuyiswayo
nonRefundable.body: Ngokubanzi, asibuyiseli mali ngexesha elingasetyenziswanga, iinxalenye zeentlawulo ezingaphelelanga, okanye ukusilela ukurhoxisa ngaphambi kokuhlaziywa.

thirdParty.title: Ukuthengwa kweQela lesiThathu
thirdParty.body: Ukuba kuthengwe ngeqonga lesithathu njengeApple App Store, imbuyekezo kufuneka icelwe ngokuthe ngqo kuloo maqonga.

contact.title: Nxibelelana
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

about.title: Malunga neChatforia
about.description: IChatforia liqonga lokunxibelelana lanamhlanje elenzelwe unxibelelwano olukhuselekileyo nolwimi oluninzi...
about.privacyDesc: Ukhuseleko olomeleleyo kunye neesetingi zolawulo lomsebenzisi
about.controlDesc: Iimpawu ezifana nemiyalezo ephelayo kunye neerisithi zokufunda

whyMessaging.title: Kutheni amaQonga okuThumela imiyalezo ebaluleke ngakumbi kunangaphambili
whyMessaging.intro: Amaqonga okuthumela imiyalezo abe yenye yezixhobo ezibalulekileyo zonxibelelwano kwihlabathi lanamhlanje...
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Abantu baxhomekeke kwiapps zemiyalezo yonke imihla...

global.title: Ikamva loNxibelelwano lweHlabathi
global.futureDesc: Ikamva lonxibelelwano luza kubandakanya izinto ezintsha...

howItWorks.title: Indlela iChatforia esebenza ngayo
howItWorks.intro: IChatforia yenzelwe ukwenza unxibelelwano lube lula...
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bhalisa usebenzisa i-imeyile okanye igama lomsebenzisi...

safety.title: Ukhuseleko & Imigaqo yoLuntu
safety.respectDesc: Abasebenzisi kulindeleke ukuba bahloniphe omnye nomnye...

chat.selectPrompt: Khetha umbhalo okanye igumbi lencoko ukuqala ukuncokola
chat.blockError: Ayikwazanga ukufumana umsebenzisi ekujoliswe kuye ukuze avalwe.
chat.unlockToView: Vula isitshixo sakho ukuze ubone lo myalezo

messageInput.freeLimit: Umda wesicwangciso sasimahla: ukuzicima ngokuzenzekelayo ukuya kutsho kusuku olu-1. Kubekwe kwi-1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Ubuninzi bokuzicima ngokuzenzekelayo kwi-Premium yiintsuku ezingama-30. Kubekwe kwi-30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Bhala umyalezo okanye namathisela ifayile ukuze uthumele.
messageInput.caption: Umbhalo (ukhetho)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Ukunamathisela kukhulu kakhulu. Zama ifayile encinci.
errors.rateLimit: Uthumela imiyalezo ngokukhawuleza kakhulu. Nceda ucothise.
errors.validation: Impazamo yokuqinisekisa. Nceda ujonge umyalezo wakho uze uzame kwakhona.
errors.failedToSend: Ayiphumelelanga ukuthumela. Ungazama kwakhona iqamza elingaphumelelanga.

contactList.couldNotStart: Ayikwazanga ukuqala incoko. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
contactList.startFailed: Ukqala incoko akuphumelelanga. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
contactList.deleteFailed: Ukucima umnxibelelanisi akuphumelelanga. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Ukuhlaziya i-alias akuphumelelanga. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
contactList.loadFailed: Ayiphumelelanga ukulayisha abaxhumenisi. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
contactList.callStarted: Ufowuna kule nombolo ngenombolo yakho yeChatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Ayiphumelelanga ukuqala ukufowuna. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

startChatModal.title: Qala incoko
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Khangela igama, igama lomsebenzisi, okanye inombolo yefowuni

addContactModal.title: Yongeza umnxibelelanisi
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Faka inombolo yefowuni okanye igama lomsebenzisi.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Akukho media igcinwe kweli qhinga okwangoku.

status.filesNote: Ukuya kutsho kwii-5 iifayile. I-24h yokuphelelwa lixesha ngokuzenzekelayo.

profile.title: Iprofayile yomsebenzisi
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Bonisa umbhalo wokuqala kunye nemiyalezo eguqulelweyo
profile.noPrivateKey: Akukho sitshixo esiyimfihlo kwesi sixhobo ukuze sikhuphe.
profile.setBackupPassword: Misela iphasiwedi ukuze ufihle ugcino lwakho:
profile.importFailed: Ayiphumelelanga ukungenisa isitshixo (iphasiwedi engalunganga okanye ifayile eyonakeleyo).
profile.keysRotated: Isibini esitsha sezitshixo senziwe kwaye isitshixo sikawonke-wonke silayishiwe.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Isitshixo sakho esiyimfihlo asiphumi kwesi sixhobo. Khupha ikopi ekhuselweyo ngephasiwedi ukuze uyibuyisele kwesinye isixhobo.
profile.themeFreeNotice: UkwisiCwangciso sasimahla—sebenzisa iinketho ze-Sun/Moon ezihlaba ngaphantsi. Phucula ukuze uvule izihloko ezininzi.
profile.backupDesc: Gcina isitshixo sakho sokufihla ukuze ubuyisele imiyalezo yakho ngokukhuselekileyo kwesinye isixhobo.
profile.freePlanCopy: UkwisiCwangciso sasimahla. Phucula ukuze uvule iimpawu ezininzi ezifana nogcino, iinombolo ezongezelelweyo, kunye neenketho zangasese eziphucukileyo.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ayikwazanga ukuvula i-portal yokuhlawula. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
profile.followHint: Amabali abo aya kuvela kwifidi yakho ye-Following ukuba baposta nge-abhudanisi Abalandeli (okanye Kuluntu lonke).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Dlulisela iifowuni ezingenayo kunye nemiyalezo kwifowuni okanye i-imeyile yakho eqinisekisiweyo. Iifowuni/imiyalezo ephumayo inokubonisa inombolo yakho yeChatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha ubuncinane indawo enye (ifowuni okanye i-imeyile).
profile.errQuietHours: Iiyure zokuthula kufuneka zibe phakathi kwe-0 ne-23.
profile.ageBandHint: Sigcina kuphela uluhlu lweminyaka (hayi umhla wakho wokuzalwa ochanekileyo). Oku kusetyenziselwa ukugcina ukudibanisa kwe-Random Chat kufanelekile.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Sebenzisa ukudibanisa okusekelwe kwiminyaka kwi-Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Xa ivuliwe, sizama ukukudibanisa nabantu kwizintlu zeminyaka ezifanelekileyo.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Abantwana abakwiminyaka eyi-13–17 bahlala bedibana kuphela nabanye abantwana abakwiminyaka eyi-13–17. Abantu abadala abanakudibaniswa nabantwana.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ukuze kukhuseleke, ii-akhawunti ezikwiminyaka eyi-13–17 zinokudibaniswa kuphela nezinye ii-akhawunti ezikwiminyaka eyi-13–17 kwi-Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Xa le nto ivuliwe, iForia inokusebenzisa iincoko zakho zangaphambili ze-Random Chat (kuphela nawe) ukuze igcine incoko ihamba. Ungayicima nanini na.
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Usetyenziswa xa umbulo wakho womsindo ungafumaneki.
profile.voicemailNote: I-voicemails ezivela kwiinombolo zakho zeChatforia ziya kugcinwa kwibhokisi yakho ye-Voicemail. Ungavumela ukuguqulela kunye nokudlulisela kwizicwangciso ezixhaswayo.
profile.portHint: Ufuna ukugcina inombolo yakho yangoku? Ungayifaka kwiChatforia Wireless.

esim.title: I-eSIM yeChatforia
esim.desc: Fumana idatha yeselula yeChatforia xa ukude ne-Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: I-Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Lawula isicwangciso sakho seselula seChatforia, iinombolo, ukudlulisela, nokufaka inombolo.

options.heading: Khetha indlela ofuna ukuyisebenzisa ngayo iChatforia
options.subheading: Ungafumana inombolo entsha yeChatforia, okanye uze nenombolo yakho ekhoyo evela kwenye inkampani.
options.portNumber: Faka inombolo yakho yangoku kwiChatforia Wireless

port.heading: Faka inombolo yakho ekhoyo
port.subheading: Hambisa inombolo yakho yangoku yefowuni evela kwinkampani yakho yangoku uye kwiChatforia. Qiniseka ukuba iinkcukacha ziyahambelana neakhawunti yakho yenkampani ukuze kuthintelwe ukulibaziseka.
port.success: Isicelo sokufaka sithunyelwe! Siya kuhlala sikuhlaziyela.

status.heading: Isimo sokufaka
status.subheading: Landelela isimo sezicelo zakho zokufaka inombolo.

wireless.exhausted: Idatha yakho iphelile. Thenga ipakethe entsha ukuze uqhubeke usebenzisa idatha yeselula.

error.invite: Ayikwazanga ukwenza isimemo. Qiniseka ukuba ungumnini wosapho uze uzame kwakhona.
error.checkout: Asikwazanga ukuqala ukukhetha kwi-Family plan. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

billing.freePlanCopy: UkwisiCwangciso sasimahla. Phucula ukuze uvule iimpawu ezininzi.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Ungalawula okanye urhoxise isubscription yakho kwi-portal yokuhlawula, okanye urhoxise ngokukhawuleza ngezantsi.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukurhoxisa isicwangciso sakho ngokukhawuleza? Oku akunakuhlanjululwa.
billing.cancelNowError: Ayikwazanga ukurhoxisa isicwangciso sakho okwangoku. Nceda uzame kwakhona okanye usebenzise Lawula ukuhlawula.

none.title: Akukho sapho sisetwe okwangoku
none.body: Ukuze wenze i-Chatforia Family kunye ne-pool yedatha ekwabelwanayo, qalisa i-Family plan.

data.heading: I-pool yedatha ekwabelwanayo
data.caption: Onke amalungu abelana ngale pool. Siya kukulumkisa njengoko usondela kumda wakho.

invite.title: Mema ilungu elitsha
invite.body: Thumela i-imeyile okanye ikhonkco ukuze umeme umntu kwi-pool yedatha ekwabelwanayo yosapho lwakho.
invite.expiryHint: Eli khonkco liphelelwa lixesha emva kweentsuku ezimbalwa. Ungahlala usenza elinye elitsha.

join.title: Joyina usapho
join.body: Umemele ukujoyina i-Chatforia Family uze wabelane ne-pool yedatha yabo.
join.success: Ujoyine olu sapho. Ngoku wabelana ne-pool yedatha yabo.
join.error: Asikwazanga ukukongeza kolu sapho. Isimemo sinokuba singasebenzi okanye siphelelwe lixesha.

upgrade.title: Phucula
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Qala ngesicwangciso sethu sasimahla esinezintengiso. Yiya kwi-Plus ukususa iintengiso, okanye vula iimpawu zamandla apheleleyo nge-Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Khetha isicwangciso se-app, yongeza iipakethe zedatha kuwe, okanye wabelane ngedatha nosapho lwakho — konke kwindawo enye.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Qala ngesicwangciso sethu sasimahla esinezintengiso. Yiya kwi-Plus ukususa iintengiso, okanye vula iimpawu zamandla apheleleyo nge-Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Yongeza idatha ye-eSIM yehlabathi lonke ukuze iChatforia iqhubeke isebenza xa ukude ne-Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Yenza i-pool yedatha ekwabelwanayo yosapho lwakho uze ulawule ukusetyenziswa kwawo wonke umntu kwindawo enye.

free.title: Simahla
free.desc: Qalisa ukuthumela imiyalezo ngokwasimahla. Ifanelekile ukuba uzama nje iChatforia.

features.chat: Incoko ye-1:1 kunye neqela elikhawulezayo, kunye neefowuni neefowuni ze-video
features.media: Yabelana ngeefoto, imiyalezo yomsindo, neevidiyo ezimfutshane
features.ai: Impendulo ephucukileyo ye-AI kunye nokuguqulela okukhawulezayo (ukusetyenziswa okufanelekileyo)
features.disappearing: Imiyalezo enyamalalayo kunye nolawulo olusisiseko lobucala

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Zonke izinto ezibalulekileyo, ngaphandle kweentengiso. Ilungile kukusebenzisa imiyalezo nokufowuna yemihla ngemihla.

features.forwarding: Dlulisela iifowuni nemiyalezo kwinombolo yakho yangempela yefowuni
features.history: Imbali yemiyalezo ende (ukuya kutsho kwiinyanga ezi-6)
features.support: Uncedo olukhawulezayo xa into ingahambi kakuhle

premiumMonthly.title: I-Premium (Ngenyanga)
premiumMonthly.desc: Amava apheleleyo eChatforia: izixhobo zamandla ze-AI, ukulungisa, kunye noncedo oluphambili.

features.themes: Vula zonke izihloko zemibala ze-premium kunye nokulungisa i-app
features.ai: Izixhobo ze-AI ze-Premium kuphela zokubhala kwakhona, impendulo ephucukileyo, kunye nezishwankathelo
features.support: Uncedo oluphambili xa ufuna uncedo kakhulu

premiumAnnual.title: I-Premium (Ngonyaka)
premiumAnnual.desc: Gcina ngakumbi xa uhlawulwa ngonyaka — kubandakanya izihloko zemibala ezongezelelweyo, izixhobo ze-AI, kunye noncedo oluphambili.

features.allPremium: Yonke into ekwi-Premium yenyanga — kubandakanya izihloko zemibala ezongezelelweyo
features.save25: Gcina malunga ne-30% xa kuthelekiswa nokuhlawula ngenyanga
features.bestFor: Ilungile kakhulu kubasebenzisi abanamandla, abasebenzi abakude, kunye nabahambi abaninzi

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Gcina i-30% ngonyaka – qhubeka ukuze ungene
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Ihlawulwa kwangaphambili. Rhoxisa nanini na. Akukho ntlawulo zifihliweyo.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Iimpawu ezipheleleyo, iiringtones, kunye nezixhobo zamandla ze-AI.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Ihlawulwa kwangaphambili. Rhoxisa nanini na. Akukho ntlawulo zifihliweyo.

mobile.title: I-Chatforia Mobile (iipakethe zedatha ye-eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Yongeza idatha yehlabathi lonke ukuze iChatforia iqhubeke isebenza ngaphandle kwe-Wi-Fi. Amaxabiso ahlengahlengiswa ngokuzenzekelayo ngokwelizwe lakho kunye nemali.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Khetha ipakethe yedatha yehlabathi lonke enye ukuze iChatforia iqhubeke isebenza xa uhamba okanye ukude ne-Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Asithengisi iipakethe zedatha ezingaphantsi kwe-3 GB.

disclaimer.devices: Iipakethe zedatha ye-eSIM zifuna isixhobo esisebenzisana ne-eSIM kwaye esivuliweyo. Ukufumaneka kuyahluka ngokwemodeli yefowuni, inkampani, kunye nelizwe. Ukugubungela kunye nesantya kuyahluka ngommandla.

small.title: Ipakethe yokuqalisa
small.desc: Ibandakanya i-3 GB yedatha enesantya esiphezulu — ilungile kukuthumela imiyalezo okukhanya kunye neefowuni ngamaxesha athile.
small.bestFor: Uhambo olufutshane, ukuthumela imiyalezo okukhanya, kunye neefowuni ngamaxesha athile

medium.title: Ipakethe yomhambi
medium.desc: Ibandakanya i-5 GB yedatha enesantya esiphezulu kuhambo, ukuya nokubuya, kunye neefowuni ze-VoIP eziqhelekileyo.
medium.bestFor: Uhambo lweveki, iifowuni ze-VoIP eziqhelekileyo, kunye neemephu

large.title: Ipakethe yamandla
large.desc: Ibandakanya i-10 GB yedatha enesantya esiphezulu kwi-chat enkulu, iifowuni, kunye nevidiyo kwinethiwekhi yeChatforia.
large.bestFor: I-chat enkulu, iifowuni, ividiyo, kunye nokusetyenziswa kwe-hotspot
large.aria: Thenga ipakethe yedatha ye-eSIM yomsebenzisi onamandla

compare.title: Thelekisa iipakethe zedatha ye-eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ukusetyenziswa kwedatha yokwenene kuxhomekeke kwindlela osebenzisa ngayo iChatforia (ilizwi, ividiyo, imedia, kunye nezinye ii-app kwifowuni yakho).

family.title: I-Chatforia Family (idatha ekwabelwanayo)
family.subtitle: Yabelana nge-pool yedatha enye kusapho lwakho. I-bill enye, ii-akhawunti ezininzi zeChatforia, ukugubungela kwihlabathi lonke.

small.title: Usapho oluncinci
small.desc: Ibandakanya i-20 GB yedatha enesantya esiphezulu ekwabelwanayo — ilungile kubasebenzisi aba-2–3 abakhanya.

medium.title: Usapho oluphakathi
medium.desc: Ibandakanya i-40 GB yedatha enesantya esiphezulu ekwabelwanayo — ilungile kumalungu angama-3–5 asebenzayo.

large.title: Usapho olukhulu
large.desc: Ibandakanya i-80 GB yedatha enesantya esiphezulu ekwabelwanayo — kubasapho abanamandla abahlala be-online.

feature.members: Mema ukuya kutsho kumalungu angama-4 adibaniswayo
feature.fairUse: Ixhomekeke kumgaqo-nkqubo wokusetyenziswa okufanelekileyo kunye nemida yasekhaya

family.disclaimer: Iipakethe zosapho zenza okanye zigcwalise i-pool yedatha ekwabelwanayo. Ungamema kwaye ususe amalungu nanini na.
family.footnote: Iipakethe zosapho zabelana nge-pool yedatha enye kwi-akhawunti zeChatforia ezidibeneyo. Ukufumaneka kunye nemida kuxhomekeke kwilizwe lakho kunye nemithetho yasekhaya.

why.title: Kutheni abantu betshintshela kwiChatforia
why.subtitle: IChatforia ikunika inombolo yefowuni yangempela, ukuguqulela okukrelekrele, kunye nendlela ecacileyo yokuya kwi-ad-free xa ukulungele.

textnow.title: IChatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Iintengiso ezikhaphukhaphu kwi-Free, ukuphucula okulula kwi-Plus xa ukulungele, kunye nezixhobo ze-Premium ezingafumanekiyo kwi-TextNow.

voice.title: IChatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: I-app yanamhlanje, uyilo lwehlabathi lokuqala, kunye nokuguqulela okwakhelwe ngaphakathi endaweni yokudlulisela iifowuni zakudala.

messengers.title: IChatforia vs ii-app zencoko
messengers.body: Thumela iinombolo zefowuni zangempela — hayi kuphela abanye abasebenzisi be-app — nge-AI kunye nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi. Ilungile ukuba uvela kwii-app ezifana ne-TextFree okanye i-TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Uthelekiso olusekelwe kulwazi olufumaneka esidlangalaleni kwaye lunokutshintsha ngokuhamba kwexesha. Ezinye ii-app zokuthumela imiyalezo yasimahla ezifana ne-TextFree okanye i-TextMe zihlala zifana ne-TextNow.

free.a: Ewe. Isicwangciso sasimahla sibandakanya inombolo yeChatforia, ukufowuna, kunye nokuthumela imiyalezo ngeentengiso. Ungahlala kwi-Free ixesha elide njengoko uthanda, okanye uphucule ukuze ususe iintengiso uze uvule iimpawu ezininzi.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa iintengiso kwaye yandisa imbali yemiyalezo yakho — ilungile kukusebenzisa yemihla ngemihla. I-Premium yongeza ukulungisa okongezelelweyo, izixhobo ze-AI zokubhala kwakhona kunye nempendulo, kunye noncedo oluphambili kubasebenzisi abanamandla.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ukugubungela kwe-eSIM yehlabathi lonke. Ukufumaneka kuxhomekeke kwilizwe lakho kunye nesixhobo. Uya kubona iinketho ezixhaswayo ngexesha lokuvula ngaphakathi kwi-app.

cancel.q: Ndingarhoxisa okanye nditshintshe izicwangciso nanini na?
cancel.a: Ewe. Ungalawula okanye urhoxise isubscription yakho kwiphepha lokuhlawula kwi-app. Utshintsho lusebenza ekupheleni kwexesha lokuhlawula langoku.

family.a: Iipakethe zosapho zenza i-pool yedatha ekwabelwanayo kwi-akhawunti ezininzi zeChatforia. Umntu omnye uhlawula i-bill, kwaye unokumema okanye ususe amalungu kwaye umisele imida ngomntu ngamnye.

gettingStarted.title: Ukuqalisa
gettingStarted.subtitle: Umtsha kwiChatforia? Esi siqaliso sikhawulezayo sibonisa izinto ezibalulekileyo ukuze ube nomveliso kwimizuzu embalwa.

alert.text: Esi sikhokelo siya kukhula njengoko sethula iimpawu ezintsha. Ukuba kukho into elahlekileyo, sazise nge

section2.title: 2) Qalisa ukuthumela imiyalezo
section2.item1: Yenza i-DM okanye iQela uze uthumele umyalezo wakho wokuqala.
section2.item2: Sebenzisa ukuguqulela okukhawulezayo ukuze uncokole kwiilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100.
section2.item3: Zama imiyalezo enyamalalayo kunye neziqinisekiso zokufunda kwi-Profile → Ubucala.

section3.title: 3) Yiya phambili
section3.item1: Ungaphucula kwisicwangciso esihlawulwayo nanini na ngaphakathi kwi-app.
section3.item2: Nje ukuba ungene, unokudibanisa izixhobo ezongezelelweyo kwaye umisele ugcino olufihliweyo kwi-Settings kwi-app.

account.q: Ndingayenza njani okanye ndibuyisele iakhawunti yam?
account.a: Khuphela i-app okanye sebenzisa iwebhu, cofa “Yenza iakhawunti”, qinisekisa i-imeyile/ifowuni yakho. Ukuze ubuyisele, sebenzisa “Ulibele iphasiwedi”.

privacy.a: Ewe. Imiyalezo neefowuni zifihlwe ukuphela ukuphela ngokuzenzekelayo. Nguwe nomamkeli kuphela onokuzifunda.

translate.a: Vumela “Guqulela ngokuzenzekelayo” kwi-Settings → Inkangeleko & Ulwimi. Siguqulela kwisixhobo apho kuxhaswayo, kungenjalo ngee-API ezikhuselekileyo ezinemetadatha encinci.

contact.a: Fikelela kuthi kwi-support@chatforia.com. Bandakanya izikrini kunye nenguqulo ye-app yakho.

contact.title: Qhagamshelana nathi
contact.errorSend: Ayikwazanga ukuthumela. Nceda uthumele i-imeyile kwi-support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Lo mgaqo-nkqubo wabucala uchaza indlela iChatforia (“thina”, “thina”) eqokelela, isebenzise, kwaye yabelane ngolwazi xa usebenzisa ii-app zethu kunye neenkonzo zethu. Siyila iChatforia ukunciphisa idatha esinokuyifikelela.

infoWeCollect.title: Ulwazi esiluqokelelayo
infoWeCollect.account: Ulwazi lweakhawunti (umz., i-imeyile/ifowuni) ukuze wenze kwaye ukhusele iakhawunti yakho.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Umxholo ofihliweyo (imiyalezo/iifowuni) ufihlwe ukuphela ukuphela; asinakuwufunda.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Ukuxilongwa/ukusetyenziswa njengezikhombisi zokuphazamiseka, uhlobo lwesixhobo, okanye uhlalutyo oluqhelekileyo ukuze kuphuculwe ukusebenza.

sms.title: Iinombolo zefowuni eziphathwayo kunye ne-SMS
sms.body: Ukuba ukhetha ukunikezela inombolo yefowuni ephathwayo, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela iimpawu ezifana nokuqinisekisa iakhawunti, izaziso zokungena, kunye nokuthumela imiyalezo phakathi kwabasebenzisi nge-SMS apho kuxhaswayo. Singathumela imiyalezo ye-SMS enxulumene neakhawunti yakho kunye nomsebenzi kwiChatforia. Ungarhoxa ekufumaneni imiyalezo ye-SMS nanini na ngokuphendula ngegama elixhaswayo lokurhoxa (njengo “STOP”) okanye ngokutshintsha izinto ozikhethayo zesaziso kwi-app. Asithengisi inombolo yakho yefowuni okanye siyisebenzise ukuthengisa okungahambelaniyo.

howWeUse.title: Indlela esisebenzisa ngayo ulwazi
howWeUse.provide: Nika kwaye ukhusele inkonzo (ukungena, ukufumanisa i-spam/ukuxhatshazwa).

sharing.title: Ukwabelana
sharing.body: Asithengisi idatha yomntu. Singabelana ngedatha enomda kunye nabaqhubekisi (umz., izaziso zokutyhala, uhlalutyo) phantsi kwezivumelwano ezingqongqo.

rights.title: Amalungelo akho
rights.body: Ngokuxhomekeke kummandla wakho (umz., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), unokucela ukufikelela, ukulungisa, ukususa, okanye ukurhoxa kulungiselelo oluthile. Qhagamshelana: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Ukugcinwa kwedatha & ukukhuseleka
retention.body: Sigcina kuphela oko kufunekayo ukuze sisebenzise inkonzo kwaye sisebenzise ukhuseleko olusemgangathweni weshishini. Umxholo we-E2E awunakuguqulelwa kuthi.

children.title: Abantwana
children.body: IChatforia ayijoliswanga kubantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka eyi-13 (okanye njengoko kufunwa ngumthetho wakho wendawo).

changes.title: Utshintsho
changes.body: Siya kuposa uhlaziyo apha kwaye sihlaziye umhla “Uhlaziywe mva”.

contact.title: Qhagamshelana
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ngokusebenzisa iChatforia uyavuma kule miqathango. Ukuba awuvumi, ungayisebenzisi inkonzo.

accounts.title: I-akhawunti
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Nika ulwazi oluchanekileyo kwaye ugcine iziqinisekiso zakho zikhuselekile.

acceptableUse.title: Ukusetyenziswa okwamkelekileyo
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Akukho mxholo ongekho mthethweni, oxhatshazayo, okanye owaphulayo; akukho spam okanye ukuxhatshazwa okuzenzekelayo.

sms.title: Unxibelelwano nge-SMS
sms.body: Ukuba unikezela inombolo yefowuni ephathwayo, uyavuma ukuba iChatforia inokuthumela imiyalezo ye-SMS enxulumene neakhawunti yakho kunye nokusebenzisa kwakho inkonzo, njengezaziso zokungena, izaziso zokhuseleko, kunye nemiyalezo enxulumene neencoko oziqalayo okanye othathe inxaxheba kuzo. Asisebenzisi i-SMS ukuthengisa okanye ukuthengisa ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacileyo. Imiyalezo eqhelekileyo kunye neentlawulo zedatha zinokusebenza. Ungarhoxa kwimiyalezo ye-SMS nanini na ngokuphendula ngegama elixhaswayo lokurhoxa (umzekelo, “STOP”) okanye ngokuhlaziya izinto ozikhethayo zesaziso kwi-app.

yourContent.title: Umxholo wakho
yourContent.body: Ugcina amalungelo kumxholo wakho. Usinika amalungelo afunekayo ukuze sisebenzise inkonzo (umz., ukudlulisela, ukugcina, ukuguqulela).

disclaimer.title: Izikhubekiso & uxanduva
disclaimer.body: Inkonzo inikezelwa “njengoko injalo” ngaphandle kweziqinisekiso. Kwinqanaba eliphezulu elivunyelweyo ngumthetho, iChatforia ayinaxanduva lomonakalo ongenanto okanye wokulandela.

changes.title: Utshintsho
changes.body: Singahlaziya le miqathango; ukuqhubeka ukusebenzisa emva kotshintsho kuthetha ukwamkela.

contact.title: Qhagamshelana
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ungathengisi okanye wabelane ngolwazi lwam lomntu
doNotSell.body: IChatforia ayithengisi ulwazi lomntu. Abahlali baseCalifornia basenokuthumela izicelo phantsi kwe-CPRA besebenzisa iqhosha elingezantsi.

cookies.title: Iisetingi ze-Cookie
cookies.body: IChatforia isebenzisa ii-cookies ezincinci (umz., iseshoni, ukhuseleko). Asisebenzisi ii-cookies zentengiso yomntu wesithathu. Lawula ii-cookies ngeesetingi zesikhangeli sakho.

phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Akukho nombolo inikezelweyo. Khetha enye ngokwe-area code ukuqala ukuthumela imiyalezo.

startChatModal.title: Qala incoko
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Bhala igama, igama lomsebenzisi, ifowuni, okanye i-imeyile…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Bhala igama lomsebenzisi okanye ifowuni uze ucinezele uKhangela.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Iingeniso zefowuni/i-imeyile ziya kufumaneka emva kokuba uzigcinile njengabaxhumenisi.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Ayiphumelelanga ukuqala incoko kunye nabamkeli abakhethiweyo.

sounds.freeNotice: UkwisiCwangciso sasimahla — iitoni ze-premium zibonisiwe kodwa zitshixiwe. Phucula ukuze uvule zonke.

aiSettings.title: Iisetingi ze-AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Lawula ukuguqulela, impendulo ephucukileyo, kunye neempendulo ezizenzekelayo zeForiaBot.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Thumela imiyalezo yokugqibela efunyenweyo (ecociweyo) kwi-AI ukucebisa impendulo ekhawulezayo.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Ukuba ivuliwe, iingcebiso ezibuyiswa yi-AI ziya kuba namagama aphawulweyo afihliweyo

accessibilitySettings.title: Ukufikeleleka & Izaziso
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Iinketho zokwenza iChatforia ibe lula ukuyisebenzisa ngaphandle kokuxhomekeka kwisandi.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Iqala kubungakanani obuqhelekileyo. Yandisa ukuba ukhetha umbhalo omkhulu kwiisetingi zokufikeleleka.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Izaziso ezibonakalayo zemiyalezo & iifowuni
Bonisa iibhena kunye nokubhitya kwesihloko ukuze ungaphoswa ngumsebenzi.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate kwimiyalezo emitsha (xa kuxhaswa)
Qalisa ukudlidlizela kwesixhobo ngezaziso.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Ukukhanya kwescreen kwifowuni engenayo
Ukukhanya okukhanyayo okufutshane xa ifowuni ikhala.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Bonisa iibhena kunye nokubhitya kwesihloko ukuze ungaphoswa ngumsebenzi.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Ukukhanya okukhanyayo okufutshane xa ifowuni ikhala.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Gcina kuphela i-ciphertext kwiseva. Ivala i-AI/Guqulela kunye nokujonga kwangaphambili kokumodareyitha.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Khangela nge-alias, igama, igama lomsebenzisi, okanye ifowuni
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Yabelana ngekhonkco lakho lokumema ukuqala ukuncokola ngokukhawuleza.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Hlala uqhagamshelene xa uhamba ngeChatforia ye-iOS ne-Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Icebiso: Imiyalezo yakho ihlala ihambelana kwiwebhu nakwiselfowuni.

randomChat.title: Incoko engacwangciswanga
randomChat.description: Dibana nomntu omtsha ngokukhawuleza. Siya kukudibanisa kwaye sivule igumbi lencoko elithathela ingqalelo. Qala ngokungaziwa. Yongeza umhlobo kamva ukuba ivakala ilungile.
randomChat.saveGuard: Iincoko zomntu ukuya komnye kuphela ezinokugcinwa
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Sigcina kuphela uluhlu lweminyaka (hayi umhla wakho wokuzalwa ochanekileyo). Oku kusetyenziselwa ukugcina ukudibanisa kwe-Random Chat kufanelekile. Ukuze udibane nabantu (hayi uRiaBot kuphela), misela uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwi-Settings → Iminyaka & Incoko engacwangciswanga.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Misela uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwi-Profile → Iminyaka & Incoko engacwangciswanga ukuze udibane nabantu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ukuze udibane nabantu (hayi uRiaBot kuphela), misela uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwi-Settings → Iminyaka & Incoko engacwangciswanga.
randomChat.subtitle: Dibana nomntu omtsha ngokukhawuleza, okanye khetha ukuncokola noRia.
randomChat.setAge: Misela uluhlu lwakho lweminyaka kwi-Profile → Iminyaka & Incoko engacwangciswanga ukuze udibane nabantu.

ria.intro: Hey khona 👋 NdingoRia. Yintoni esengqondweni yakho?

greetings.long4: Kuyamnandi ukukubona, {{name}} 👋 Yintoni esengqondweni yakho namhlanje?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 😊 Ufuna ukukhupha, ukubuza, okanye ukuncokola nje?
greetings.short2: Wamkelekile kwakhona {{name}} 👋 Kukhona enye into ofuna ukuyongeza?
greetings.short3: Kwakhona, {{name}}? 😊 Xelela ukuba yintoni esengqondweni yakho.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} 👋 Ukulungele ukuqhubeka apho besiyekile khona?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}!! Unento entsha esengqondweni yakho?

login.title: Qhubeka kwiChatforia
login.subtitle: Ngena kwiakhawunti yakho yeChatforia

forgot.title: Ulibele iphasiwedi
forgot.helper: Faka i-imeyile owasebenzisa ngayo ukwenza iakhawunti yakho yeChatforia kwaye siya kuthumela ikhonkco elikhuselekileyo lokusetha kwakhona iphasiwedi yakho.
forgot.genericError: Ayikwazanga ukucubungula isicelo. Nceda uzame kwakhona emva komzuzwana.
forgot.sentHelper: Ukuba iakhawunti ikhona nge-imeyile leyo, sithumele ikhonkco lokusetha kwakhona iphasiwedi. Inokuthatha imizuzu embalwa ukufika. Qiniseka ukuba ujonga i-spam okanye ifolda yokuthengisa.

login.ssoUnavailable: Ukungena nge-single-sign-on akufumaneki okwangoku. Sebenzisa igama lomsebenzisi & iphasiwedi endaweni yoko.

error.unprocessable: Isicelo esingalunganga. Jonga igama lomsebenzisi/i-imeyile kunye nephasiwedi.
error.deviceLimit: Umda wesixhobo ufikisiwe kwisicwangciso sasimahla. Phuma kwesinye isixhobo okanye uphucule kwi-Premium ukuze udibanise izixhobo ezininzi.

dialer.title: Iifowuni
dialer.subtitle: Ikhiphedi & izinto zakutsha. (Ukuba awusebenzisi i-PSTN, qala iifowuni kwintloko yencoko.)

video.title: Ividiyo
video.roomsDesc: Ividiyo yabantu abaninzi esebenzisa igama legumbi elabelanayo.
video.roomsIntro: Joyina okanye yenza igumbi labantu abaninzi.

direct.title: Ividiyo ethe ngqo
direct.subtitle: Qalisa ifowuni yevidiyo ye-1:1 usebenzisa inombolo yefowuni okanye igama lomsebenzisi leChatforia.
direct.tipInvite: Icebiso: Namathisela inombolo uze ufowune ngaphandle kokugcina umnxibelelanisi. Siya kumema abangengabo abasebenzisi ngekhonkco.

rooms.title: Amagumbi
rooms.subtitle: Yenza igumbi okanye joyina elikhoyo ngokubhala igama elifanayo.
rooms.desc: Ividiyo yabantu abaninzi esebenzisa igama legumbi elabelanayo.
rooms.tip: Icebiso: yabelana ngeli gama nabanye, okanye udibanise ngokuthe ngqo kwi /video?room=room-name.

directVideo.intro: Qalisa ifowuni yevidiyo ethe ngqo ye-1:1.

phoneWarning.title: Inombolo yakho iyaphela kungekudala
phoneWarning.body: Inombolo yakho {{number}} iya kukhululwa nge {{date}} ngaphandle kokuba ivuselelwe.

support.heading: Singakunceda njani?
support.contactIntro: Siya kuthumela i-imeyile impendulo. Bandakanya iinkcukacha ukuze usincede siphinde senze ingxaki.
support.sendError: Ayikwazanga ukuthumela. Thumela i-imeyile kwi-support@chatforia.com endaweni yoko.

encryptionRecovery.title: Lawula ukufihla
encryptionRecovery.description: Gcina, buyisela, vula, okanye setha kwakhona isitshixo sakho sokufihla.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Esi sikhangeli asikwazi okwangoku ukuguqulela imiyalezo yakho efihliweyo. Buyisela, vula, okanye setha kwakhona isitshixo sakho ukuze uqhubeke.

unlockPasscode.label: Vula iphasikhowudi (isixhobo sangoku)
unlockPasscode.description: Isetyenziselwa ukuguqulela izitshixo zakho kweli qhinga ngaphambi kokukhupha

restoreBackupPassword.label: Iphasiwedi yogcino
restoreBackupPassword.description: Iphasiwedi oyenzileyo xa ugcina isitshixo sakho kwi-iPhone

resetLocalPasscode.label: Iphasiwedi entsha yasekhaya
resetLocalPasscode.description: Ifuneka phambi kokusetha kwakhona ukuze isitshixo esitsha sikhuseleke kwesi sixhobo

errors.restoreIncomplete: Ukubuyisela isitshixo akugqitywanga okanye akulunganga kule akhawunti
errors.noBackup: Akukho gcino olufihliweyo likhoyo kule akhawunti
errors.noServerPublicKey: Le akhawunti ayibonisi isitshixo sikawonke-wonke seseva okwangoku
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Ugcino lwe seva aluhambelani nesitshixo sokufihla seakhawunti yangoku

confirm.reset:
Seta kwakhona ukufihla kule akhawunti?

Imiyalezo emidala efihliweyo inokuba ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuba ubuyisela isitshixo sokuqala kamva.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Oku kwenza isitshixo sokufihla esitsha seakhawunti yakho. Imiyalezo emidala efihliweyo inokuba ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuba ubuyisela isitshixo sokuqala kamva.

press.title: I-Press
press.contactLine: Ukwenza imibuzo yeendaba, fikelela kuthi kwi
press.boilerplateBody: IChatforia yi-app yomyalezo ebeka ubucala kuqala eyenza incoko yezilwimi ezahlukeneyo ibe lula. Imiyalezo ifihlwe ukuphela ukuphela ngokuzenzekelayo, kwaye ukuguqulela okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kuxhasa iilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100 ngexesha lokwenene. Abasebenzisi banokuvumela imiyalezo enyamalalayo, ukugcina iziqinisekiso zokufunda njengokhetho, kunye nokuvumelanisa kwiizixhobo. Ifumaneka kwi-iOS, Android, nakwiwebhu.
press.scanTip: Kwi-desktop? Skena ngefowuni yakho ukuze ufumane i-app.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siliqela elincinci elisekayo elakha iChatforia — umyalezo wabucala wehlabathi eliqalayo kwiwebhu, iOS, kunye ne-Android. Ukuba ukhathalela ubucala, ukufihla, kunye namava omsebenzisi amnandi, singathanda ukukuva.
careers.openRoles: Imisebenzi yokuseka evuliweyo: Injineli ephambili ye-Full-stack, Injineli ye-Backend (Node.js), Injineli ye-Frontend/Web (React), Injineli ye-Mobile (iOS), Injineli ye-Mobile (Android), DevOps/SRE, Injineli yoKhuseleko & Ukufihla, Injineli ye-Telecom (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Indlela yokufaka isicelo: Sebenzisa iqhosha elingezantsi ukuze uthumele i-CV yakho kunye nekhonkco.
careers.whyBullets:
• Nceda wakhe isiseko somyalezo omtsha wehlabathi.
• Thumela ukuphuculwa okusetyenziswa kwiwebhu, iOS, kunye ne-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomseki kuyilo kunye nolwalathiso lwemveliso.
• Thatha indawo enempembelelo ephezulu kwi-stack: umyalezo, ilizwi, ividiyo, ukufihla, i-telecom, i-AI.
• Joyina ekuqaleni — phambi kokuba abasebenzisi bakhule.

about.title: Malunga neChatforia
about.description: IChatforia ngumyalezo okhuselekileyo, oneelwimi ezininzi one-E2EE, ukuguqulela okukhawulezayo, kunye nokufowuna nge-video. Injongo yethu ilula: nceda abantu baqhagamshelane—ngokukhuselekileyo, ngasese, kwaye kwiilwimi ezahlukeneyo.

values.access: Ukufikelela kubo bonke: Guqulela ngokuzenzekelayo iilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100.
values.access_aria: Ukufikelela kubo bonke: Guqulela ngokuzenzekelayo iilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100.
values.control_aria: Ulawulo: Imiyalezo enyamalalayo kunye neziqinisekiso zokufunda zingumkhethe.

about.howDescription: Imiyalezo ifihlwa kwisixhobo sakho ngaphambi kokuba iphume. Ukuguqulela, ugcino, kunye nokuvumelanisa isixhobo kuyilwe ukunciphisa oko iiseva zethu zinokukubona.

advertise.title: Thengisa ngeChatforia
advertise.description: Fikelela abasebenzisi ababandakanyekayo bomyalezo ngeendawo zokubeka ezinencasa, ezikhuselekileyo kwi-brand. Sinikezela nge-inventory ye-banner kwiindawo ezibonakalayo kakhulu, i-sponsorships, kunye ne-promos zendlu. Ababhalisi be-Premium ababoni iintengiso.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Sikwasebenzisa i-inventory nge-Google AdSense. Ungajolisa iChatforia nge-publisher ID {{pubId}}, okanye usebenzise ifom engezantsi kwi-sponsorships ezithe ngqo.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Sikwasebenzisa i-inventory ethile nge-Google AdSense. I-sponsorships ezithe ngqo ziyafumaneka—sebenzisa ifom engezantsi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sigqibezela i-inventory yethu yentengiso. Xelela ushishino lwakho kwaye siya kuncoma iindawo zokubeka.

why.highSession: Ukuhamba rhoqo kweseshoni kunye nexesha lokuhlala kwi-UI yencoko
why.brandSafe: Iifomathi ezikhuselekileyo kwi-brand; ukubeka umda rhoqo ngokuhloniphekileyo
why.deals: Izivumelwano ezithe ngqo okanye i-programmatic nge-AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Enkosi! Umbuzo wakho usendleleni. Siya kulandela kungekudala.
form.missingRequired: Nceda uze igama, i-imeyile, kunye nomyalezo.
form.mailtoInfo: Ivula umxhasi wakho we-imeyile ukuze uthumele umbuzo…
form.messagePlaceholder: Ukujolisa, imihla, ii-KPIs, izinto ozikhethayo zokubeka…
